July, 1987, namely:- In the Table appended to the said nofification - (i) for serial number 110 and entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- S.No. Name of the Laboraiory Name of the Analyst 1) : (2) (3)° *110. The recognition can be revoked eariier by the Central Government ". [F.No.Q. 15018/22/2000-CPW] RAJNISHA KUMAR VAISH, Jt. Secy.
